notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Tristan Peters scores.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Tristan Peters scores.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Collins GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Collins grounds into a double play, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Starling Marte out at 2nd. Isaac Collins out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nick Loftin. Sam Antonacci to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Nick Loftin. Sam Antonacci to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jarred Kelenic. Isaac Collins to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Carter Jensen pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carter Jensen doubles (4) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jarred Kelenic.

notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone strikes out on a foul tip.
